svg.style: font-family:'IBM Plex Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Semiotic release dashboard
svg.desc: A server-rendered dashboard showing Semiotic's chart catalog, bundle sizes, capability coverage, chart families, and documentation surface growth since version 3.0.0.

svg.style: font-family:'IBM Plex Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.desc: Line chart showing chart catalog and public export growth since 3.0.0.

g.text: AI schema count + public package exports, read from release artifacts
Subpath imports keep production payloads intentional

svg.style: font-family:'IBM Plex Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.desc: Current production bundle sizes generated from dist artifacts.

g.text: Measured from current production dist with gzip -9
SSR, push, hover, and selection coverage stay explicit

svg.style: font-family:'IBM Plex Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.desc: Line chart showing SSR, push, linked hover, and selection coverage since the capability matrix shipped.

g.text: Capability matrix began in 3.5.2 and is release-gated
SSR is broad; realtime stays browser/live where that is the point

svg.style: font-family:'IBM Plex Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.desc: Stacked bars comparing SSR-renderable and browser/live chart counts by family.

g.text: Stacked by SSR-renderable vs browser/live-only chart count
15 route snapshots; category moves are reflected in each release

svg.style: font-family:'IBM Plex Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.desc: Stacked area chart showing cumulative routed documentation pages by category across release snapshots.

svg.text: Generated by scripts/generate-readme-dashboard.tsx with semiotic/server using Semiotic's Server-Side Rendering (SSR).
